check_logic.calculation: Check if there are any planets (excluding the Sun) located in the 12th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Anapha Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding expenditure, spiritual pursuits, and foreign travel.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from multiple classical texts (Svalpajanaka, Satya, Parasara) agreeing on the exclusion of the Sun for Anapha Yoga formation (रविवज्यै, पङ्केरुहेशोज्झितैः).

rules.rule_name: Durudhara Yoga Formation (Excluding Sun)

check_logic.condition: To identify the presence of Durudhara Yoga in a natal chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if there are any planets (excluding the Sun) located in both the 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Durudhara Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding overall prosperity, character, and balance in life.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from multiple classical texts (Svalpajanaka, Satya, Parasara) agreeing on the exclusion of the Sun for Durudhara Yoga formation (रविवज्यै, पङ्केरुहेशोज्झितैः).

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify the presence of Kemadruma Yoga in a natal chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if there are no planets (excluding the Sun) located in either the 2nd or the 12th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Kemadruma Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding poverty, lack of support, and general misfortune.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from multiple classical texts (Svalpajanaka, Satya, Parasara) defining Kemadruma as the absence of planets (excluding Sun) in the 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Cancellation by Aspect

check_logic.condition: Kemadruma Yoga is present in the chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the Moon is aspected by all other planets (Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn).

rules.impact_if_violated: The negative effects of Kemadruma Yoga will manifest, or its cancellation will be overlooked, leading to an incorrect assessment of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from the description of Kemadruma cancellation when Moon is aspected by all planets, as stated in Jataka Parijata and Saravali.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Cancellation by Kendra Placement from Moon

check_logic.condition: Kemadruma Yoga is present in the chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if all planets (excluding Moon, Rahu, Ketu) are placed in Kendra houses (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: The negative effects of Kemadruma Yoga will manifest, or its transformation into a positive yoga will be overlooked, leading to an incorrect assessment of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from the description of Kemadruma cancellation when all planets are in Kendras from the Moon.

rules.rule_name: Sunapha Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify Sunapha Yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (excluding Sun, Rahu, Ketu) occupies the 2nd house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Sunapha Yoga will not be correctly identified, leading to an incomplete assessment of the chart's potential.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata (implied by discussion of varieties)
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from the discussion of Sunapha Yoga varieties, implying its formation condition.

rules.rule_name: Anapha Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify Anapha Yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (excluding Sun, Rahu, Ketu) occupies the 12th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Anapha Yoga will not be correctly identified, leading to an incomplete assessment of the chart's potential.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata (implied by discussion of varieties)
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from the discussion of Anapha Yoga varieties, implying its formation condition.

rules.rule_name: Dhurudhura Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify Dhurudhura Yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Check if planets (excluding Sun, Rahu, Ketu) occupy both the 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Dhurudhura Yoga will not be correctly identified, leading to an incomplete assessment of the chart's potential.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata (implied by discussion of varieties)
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from the discussion of Dhurudhura Yoga varieties, implying its formation condition.

rules.rule_name: Sunapha Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To assess the Moon's support and general fortune, and as a prerequisite for Kemadruma Yoga assessment.
check_logic.calculation: Sunapha Yoga forms if there is at least one planet (excluding Sun) in the 2nd house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of the native's mental state and general fortune, potentially missing a positive influence or misidentifying Kemadruma Yoga.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 83
rules.extraction_notes: Definition of Sunapha Yoga, which is one of the three yogas whose absence defines Kemadruma Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Anapha Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To assess the Moon's support and general fortune, and as a prerequisite for Kemadruma Yoga assessment.
check_logic.calculation: Anapha Yoga forms if there is at least one planet (excluding Sun) in the 12th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of the native's mental state and general fortune, potentially missing a positive influence or misidentifying Kemadruma Yoga.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 83
rules.extraction_notes: Definition of Anapha Yoga, which is one of the three yogas whose absence defines Kemadruma Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Dhurudhara Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To assess the Moon's support and general fortune, and as a prerequisite for Kemadruma Yoga assessment.
check_logic.calculation: Dhurudhara Yoga forms if there are planets (excluding Sun) in both the 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of the native's mental state and general fortune, potentially missing a positive influence or misidentifying Kemadruma Yoga.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 83
rules.extraction_notes: Definition of Dhurudhara Yoga, which is one of the three yogas whose absence defines Kemadruma Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To assess the Moon's strength and general fortune, especially if Sunapha, Anapha, or Dhurudhara Yogas are absent.
check_logic.calculation: Kemadruma Yoga forms if there are no planets (excluding Sun) in the 2nd, 12th, or both 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon (i.e., if Sunapha, Anapha, and Dhurudhara Yogas are absent).

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of the native's mental state, emotional well-being, and general fortune, potentially missing a significant negative influence.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 83
rules.extraction_notes: Definition of Kemadruma Yoga based on the absence of Sunapha, Anapha, and Dhurudhara Yogas. This is a critical check for the Moon's condition.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Cancellation

check_logic.condition: If Kemadruma Yoga is present.
check_logic.calculation: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled if the Moon is in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th house from Lagna) OR if there are planets in Kendras from the Moon (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th house from Moon).

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of the native's mental state and general fortune, potentially overstating negative effects of Kemadruma Yoga.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 83
rules.extraction_notes: Cancellation conditions for Kemadruma Yoga. This is a critical check to validate the final state and impact of Kemadruma Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Sun's Exclusion from Sunapha, Anapha, Dhurudhara, and Kemadruma Yoga Calculation

check_logic.condition: When calculating Sunapha, Anapha, Dhurudhara, or Kemadruma yogas based on planetary placements around the Moon.
check_logic.calculation: The Sun is always excluded from consideration. Do not count the Sun as a planet when checking for planetary presence in the 2nd, 12th, or Kendra houses from the Moon for these specific yogas.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of planets forming these yogas, leading to fundamental errors in yoga assessment and subsequent predictions.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Explicitly stated in the 'Note' section: 'In the yogas propounded by this sloka, the Sun is always kept out of consideration.'

rules.rule_name: Sunapha, Anapha, and Dhurudhara Yoga Calculation (Standard Method)

check_logic.condition: To determine the presence of Sunapha, Anapha, or Dhurudhara yogas.
check_logic.calculation: 1. Sunapha Yoga: Exists if there is at least one planet (excluding the Sun) in the 2nd house from the Moon. 2. Anapha Yoga: Exists if there is at least one planet (excluding the Sun) in the 12th house from the Moon. 3. Dhurudhara Yoga: Exists if there are planets (excluding the Sun) in both the 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of these fundamental yogas, leading to erroneous predictions about wealth, character, and fortune.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the description of Sunapha, Anapha, Dhurudhara yogas, explicitly stating the 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon and exclusion of the Sun.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Calculation (Kendra Method)

check_logic.condition: To determine the presence of Kemadruma Yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Kemadruma Yoga does NOT exist if any Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th) from the Lagna OR from the Moon is occupied by a planet (excluding the Sun). If no Kendra from Lagna or Moon is occupied by a planet (excluding Sun), then Kemadruma Yoga is present.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Kemadruma Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions about poverty, misfortune, and lack of support.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Derived from 'not allow the केमद्रुमयोग (Kemadrumayoga) where the केन्द्र (Kendra) (calculated from the Lagna or the Moon) is associated with a planet.' Combined with Sun exclusion rule.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Calculation (Absence of Sunapha/Anapha/Dhurudhara Method)

check_logic.condition: To determine the presence of Kemadruma Yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Kemadruma Yoga exists if none of the Sunapha, Anapha, or Dhurudhara yogas are present (after excluding the Sun from their calculation as per standard rules).

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Kemadruma Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions about poverty, misfortune, and lack of support.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Derived from 'the absence of any of these 3 yogas indicates the presence of केमद्रन (Kemadruma).'

rules.rule_name: Yoga Realization - Planetary Dignity in Rashi Chart

check_logic.condition: When assessing the full realization of a yoga's effects.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the yoga-making planets occupy their exaltation sign, own sign, or a friendly sign in the Rashi (D1) chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: The full effects of the yoga will not be realized, or will be significantly diminished.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule specifies conditions for the full realization of any yoga's effects based on planetary dignity in the Rashi chart.

rules.rule_name: Yoga Realization - Planetary Dignity in Navamsa Chart

check_logic.condition: When assessing the full realization of a yoga's effects.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the yoga-making planets occupy their own sign or a friendly sign in the Navamsa (D9) chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: The full effects of the yoga will not be realized, or will be significantly diminished.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule specifies conditions for the full realization of any yoga's effects based on planetary dignity in the Navamsa chart. It specifically mentions 'own or friendly houses' for Navamsa, not exaltation.

rules.rule_name: Sakata Yoga Cancellation Condition (Moon-Jupiter definition)

check_logic.condition: IF Sakata Yoga is present, defined as Moon being in the 6th or 8th house from Jupiter.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Jupiter is placed in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th house) from the Lagna.

rules.impact_if_violated: If Jupiter is NOT in a Kendra from Lagna, the negative effects of Sakata Yoga will manifest fully.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse 109
rules.extraction_notes: This rule describes the cancellation condition for Sakata Yoga as defined by Phaladeepika (Moon in 6th or 8th from Jupiter). If this condition is met, the yoga is devoid of its bad effects.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Angular Relationship to Sun (Adhamadi Yoga)

check_logic.condition: To assess moral training, wealth, knowledge, and intellectual precision.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if Moon is in Kendra (1,4,7,10), Panapara (2,5,8,11), or Apoklima (3,6,9,12) from the Sun in the Rasi chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of fundamental qualities like moral training, wealth, knowledge, and intellectual precision.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 112
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from the description of Adhamadi Yoga, which requires this calculation to apply its interpretation.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Dignity in Navamsa (Own Sign)

check_logic.condition: When assessing Moon's strength and auspiciousness for wealth and happiness.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Moon occupies its own sign in the Navamsa (D9) chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Moon's strength and auspiciousness, leading to flawed predictions regarding wealth and happiness.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 112
rules.extraction_notes: Directly stated condition for positive results ('If the Moon be in its own Navamsa').

rules.rule_name: Moon's Dignity in Navamsa (Friendly Sign)

check_logic.condition: When assessing Moon's strength and auspiciousness for wealth and happiness.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Moon occupies a sign ruled by a very friendly planet in the Navamsa (D9) chart. (Requires a table of planetary friendships).

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Moon's strength and auspiciousness, leading to flawed predictions regarding wealth and happiness.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 112
rules.extraction_notes: Directly stated condition for positive results ('or in that of a very friendly planet').

rules.rule_name: Moon's Aspect by Jupiter and Venus

check_logic.condition: When assessing Moon's strength and auspiciousness for wealth and happiness.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Moon is aspected by Jupiter (Suraguru) and Venus (Sita) in the Rasi chart. (Requires knowledge of planetary aspects).

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Moon's strength and auspiciousness, leading to flawed predictions regarding wealth and happiness.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 112
rules.extraction_notes: Directly stated condition for positive results ('सुरगुरुसितदृष्टे' - seen by Jupiter and Venus).

rules.rule_name: Combustion of Yoga-Producing Planet

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the strength and outcome of any yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the planet forming the yoga is obscured by the Sun's rays (combust).

rules.impact_if_violated: The effect of the yoga will be mixed or significantly reduced.
rules.extraction_notes: General rule for any yoga-producing planet.

rules.rule_name: Debilitation of Yoga-Producing Planet

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the strength and outcome of any yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the planet forming the yoga is depressed (debilitated).

rules.impact_if_violated: The effect of the yoga will be mixed or significantly reduced.
rules.extraction_notes: General rule for any yoga-producing planet.

rules.rule_name: Moon-Rahu/Ketu Conjunction

check_logic.condition: When assessing the Moon's strength or the outcome of any yoga involving the Moon.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the Moon is in conjunction with Rahu or Ketu.

rules.impact_if_violated: The effect of yogas involving the Moon will be mixed; potential for emotional instability or mental affliction.
rules.extraction_notes: This condition modifies the outcome of yogas involving the Moon.

rules.rule_name: Rahu in 12th from Moon

check_logic.condition: When assessing the Moon's strength or the outcome of any yoga involving the Moon.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Rahu occupies the 12th bhava from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: The effect of yogas involving the Moon will be mixed; potential for hidden enemies, losses, or mental distress.
rules.extraction_notes: This condition modifies the outcome of yogas involving the Moon.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Auspiciousness (Day Birth, Houses 1-6)

check_logic.condition: For charts of individuals born during the day.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the Moon is placed in any of the first 6 houses (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, or 6th).

rules.impact_if_violated: If Moon is in houses 7-12 for day birth, its auspiciousness is reduced, leading to inauspicious results.
rules.extraction_notes: Defines Moon's functional nature based on birth time and house placement.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Auspiciousness (Night Birth, Houses 7-12)

check_logic.condition: For charts of individuals born during the night.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the Moon is placed in any of the houses 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, or 12.

rules.impact_if_violated: If Moon is in houses 1-6 for night birth, its auspiciousness is reduced, leading to inauspicious results.
rules.extraction_notes: Defines Moon's functional nature based on birth time and house placement (reverse of day birth).

rules.rule_name: Chandradhiyoga Benefic Placement

check_logic.condition: For Chandradhiyoga to form, benefic planets (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) must occupy the 6th, 7th, or 8th house from the Moon.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the Moon's position. Check if Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus are in the 6th, 7th, or 8th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Chandradhiyoga does not form, impacting potential for Raja Yoga effects.
rules.extraction_notes: Conditions for Chandradhiyoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Chandradhiyoga Malefic Influence Negation

check_logic.condition: For Chandradhiyoga to be effective, the benefic planets (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) forming the yoga must not be combust (eclipsed) and must not be aspected by malefics.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus are combust. Check if any malefic planet aspects Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus.

rules.impact_if_violated: Chandradhiyoga is negated or significantly weakened, reducing or nullifying its Raja Yoga effects.
rules.extraction_notes: Negating conditions for Chandradhiyoga, including combustion (eclipsed).

rules.rule_name: Lagnadhiyoga Benefic Placement

check_logic.condition: For Lagnadhiyoga to form, benefic planets must occupy the 6th, 7th, or 8th house from the Lagna.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the Lagna. Check if benefic planets are in the 6th, 7th, or 8th house from the Lagna.

rules.impact_if_violated: Lagnadhiyoga does not form, impacting potential for Raja Yoga effects.
rules.extraction_notes: Conditions for Lagnadhiyoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Lagnadhiyoga Malefic Influence Negation (Conditional)

check_logic.condition: For Lagnadhiyoga to be effective, the benefic planets forming the yoga must not be in conjunction with nor aspected by malefic planets, UNLESS those malefic planets are in the 4th house (Sukha Bhava).
check_logic.calculation: Check if any malefic planet conjuncts or aspects the benefics in 6th, 7th, or 8th from Lagna. If such a malefic influence exists, check the house position of the malefic. If the malefic is in the 4th house, the negation condition is cancelled. Otherwise, the yoga is negated.

rules.impact_if_violated: Lagnadhiyoga is negated or significantly weakened, reducing or nullifying its Raja Yoga effects.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Malefic planet causing conjunction/aspect is in the 4th house (Sukha Bhava).
cancellation_conditions.impact: Negation of Lagnadhiyoga is cancelled.

rules.extraction_notes: Negating conditions for Lagnadhiyoga, with a specific exception for malefics in the 4th house (Sukha Bhava).

rules.rule_name: Sunapha Yoga Formation (Kalyanavarman)

check_logic.condition: To check for Sunapha Yoga formation according to Kalyanavarman.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) is placed in the 2nd house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Sunapha Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of Moon's strength and general prosperity.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from Kalyanavarman's verse and general discussion regarding yogas formed by planets in houses adjacent to the Moon.

rules.rule_name: Anapha Yoga Formation (Kalyanavarman)

check_logic.condition: To check for Anapha Yoga formation according to Kalyanavarman.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) is placed in the 12th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Anapha Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of Moon's strength and general prosperity.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from Kalyanavarman's verse and general discussion regarding yogas formed by planets in houses adjacent to the Moon.

rules.rule_name: Dhurudhura Yoga Formation (Kalyanavarman)

check_logic.condition: To check for Dhurudhura Yoga formation according to Kalyanavarman.
check_logic.calculation: Check if planets (Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) are placed in BOTH the 2nd and 12th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Dhurudhura Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of Moon's strength and general prosperity.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from Kalyanavarman's verse and general discussion regarding yogas formed by planets in houses adjacent to the Moon.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Formation (Kalyanavarman)

check_logic.condition: To check for Kemadruma Yoga formation according to Kalyanavarman.
check_logic.calculation: Kemadruma Yoga is formed if ALL of the following conditions are met: (1) NO planets (Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) are in the 2nd or 12th houses from the Moon. (2) The Moon is NOT associated with any planet in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th houses from Lagna). (3) The Moon is NOT aspected by any planet (Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn).

rules.impact_if_violated: Failure to identify a highly malefic yoga, leading to significantly inaccurate predictions regarding financial stability, mental peace, and general well-being.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Presence of Sunapha Yoga (planets in 2nd from Moon, excluding Sun)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Presence of Anapha Yoga (planets in 12th from Moon, excluding Sun)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Presence of Dhurudhura Yoga (planets in 2nd and 12th from Moon, excluding Sun)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Moon is associated with a planet in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th houses from Lagna)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Moon is aspected by any planet (Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from Kalyanavarman's verse and the interpretation of Garga's principle regarding Kemadruma formation and cancellation conditions.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Cancellation (Garga - Planet in Kendra from Lagna)

check_logic.condition: To check for Kemadruma Yoga cancellation according to Garga's specific principle.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any of the five planets (Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) is placed in any of the Kendras (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th houses from Lagna). If so, Kemadruma Yoga is annulled.

rules.impact_if_violated: Failure to identify cancellation of Kemadruma Yoga, leading to an overestimation of negative effects.
rules.extraction_notes: Explicitly stated as Garga's principle for annulling Kemadruma, noting it does not produce Sunapha/Anapha/Dhurudhura.

rules.rule_name: Sunapha Yoga Formation (Yavana/Srutakirti)

check_logic.condition: To check for Sunapha Yoga formation according to Yavanas/Srutakirti.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) is placed in the 4th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Sunapha Yoga based on an alternative school of thought.
rules.extraction_notes: Presented as an alternative definition by Yavanas/Srutakirti for Sunapha Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Anapha Yoga Formation (Yavana/Srutakirti)

check_logic.condition: To check for Anapha Yoga formation according to Yavanas/Srutakirti.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) is placed in the 10th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Anapha Yoga based on an alternative school of thought.
rules.extraction_notes: Presented as an alternative definition by Yavanas/Srutakirti for Anapha Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Dhurudhura Yoga Formation (Yavana/Srutakirti)

check_logic.condition: To check for Dhurudhura Yoga formation according to Yavanas/Srutakirti.
check_logic.calculation: Check if planets (Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) are placed in BOTH the 4th and 10th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Dhurudhura Yoga based on an alternative school of thought.
rules.extraction_notes: Presented as an alternative definition by Yavanas/Srutakirti for Dhurudhura Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Kemadruma Yoga Formation (Yavana/Srutakirti)

check_logic.condition: To check for Kemadruma Yoga formation according to Yavanas/Srutakirti.
check_logic.calculation: Kemadruma Yoga is formed if NO planets (Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) are in the 4th or 10th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Failure to identify a highly malefic yoga based on an alternative school of thought.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Presence of Sunapha Yoga (planets in 4th from Moon)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Presence of Anapha Yoga (planets in 10th from Moon)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

cancellation_conditions.condition: Presence of Dhurudhura Yoga (planets in 4th and 10th from Moon)
cancellation_conditions.impact: Kemadruma Yoga is cancelled.

rules.extraction_notes: Presented as an alternative definition by Yavanas/Srutakirti, where Kemadruma is formed if Sunapha/Anapha/Dhurudhura (based on 4th/10th from Moon) are absent.

rules.rule_name: Check for Planetary Debilitation (Neecha)

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the strength or effects of any planet, especially those involved in yogas.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if the planet is in its sign of debilitation (Neecha Rashi).

rules.impact_if_violated: The planet's ability to give auspicious results is significantly reduced or reversed. Specific yogas involving this planet may be weakened or nullified.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, verse 116
rules.extraction_notes: The concept of 'debilitation' (नीच) is mentioned as a condition ('नीचास्तहीनैः') that weakens Gajakesari Yoga, implying its general importance in assessing planetary strength and yoga efficacy. While the specific signs of debilitation are not provided in this text snippet, the concept itself is presented as a critical factor.

rules.rule_name: Check for Planetary Combustion (Asta)

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the strength or effects of any planet, especially those involved in yogas.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if the planet is combust (अस्त) due to its proximity to the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: The planet's ability to give auspicious results is significantly reduced or nullified. Specific yogas involving this planet may be weakened or nullified.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, verse 116
rules.extraction_notes: The concept of 'combustion' (अस्त) is mentioned as a condition ('नीचास्तहीनैः') that weakens Gajakesari Yoga, implying its general importance in assessing planetary strength and yoga efficacy. While the specific degrees for combustion are not provided in this text snippet, the concept itself is presented as a critical factor.

rules.rule_name: Moon aspected by Venus for Happiness

check_logic.condition: The Moon is aspected by Venus.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Venus casts an aspect on the Moon according to classical aspect rules.

rules.impact_if_violated: The person born may experience reduced happiness.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita

rules.rule_name: Moon in Own Navamsa aspected by Jupiter for Wealth

check_logic.condition: The Moon is in its own Navamsa AND aspected by Jupiter.
check_logic.calculation: 1. Determine the Moon's position in the Navamsa chart. 2. Verify if the Moon is in its own sign in Navamsa. 3. Check if Jupiter casts an aspect on the Moon in the birth chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: The native may experience reduced wealth.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita

rules.rule_name: Moon in Friendly Navamsa aspected by Venus for Happiness

check_logic.condition: The Moon is in the Navamsa of a very friendly planet AND aspected by Venus.
check_logic.calculation: 1. Determine the Moon's position in the Navamsa chart. 2. Identify the lord of the Moon's Navamsa sign and check if it is a very friendly planet to the Moon. 3. Check if Venus casts an aspect on the Moon in the birth chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: The person born may experience reduced happiness.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita

rules.rule_name: Moon aspected by Jupiter and Venus for Wealth and Happiness

check_logic.condition: The Moon is aspected by Jupiter AND Venus together.
check_logic.calculation: Check if both Jupiter and Venus cast an aspect on the Moon according to classical aspect rules.

rules.impact_if_violated: The native may experience a significant reduction in wealth and happiness.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita

rules.rule_name: Chandradhiyoga Formation

check_logic.condition: Benefic planets occupy the 6th, 7th, and 8th houses from the Moon.
check_logic.calculation: 1. Identify natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, waxing Moon, Mercury not conjoined with malefics). 2. Determine the houses 6th, 7th, and 8th from the Moon's position. 3. Check if these houses are occupied by benefic planets.

rules.impact_if_violated: The Chandradhiyoga does not form, and its positive effects will be absent.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: This rule defines the formation of Chandradhiyoga.

rules.rule_name: Chandradhiyoga Effect - High Positions

check_logic.condition: Chandradhiyoga is present.
check_logic.calculation: Verify the formation of Chandradhiyoga (Rule: Chandradhiyoga Formation).

rules.impact_if_violated: The native is unlikely to attain high positions such as a commander, minister, or ruler.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: This rule describes one of the effects of Chandradhiyoga.

rules.rule_name: Chandradhiyoga Effect - Prosperity, Pleasure, Victory, Longevity, Health

check_logic.condition: Chandradhiyoga is present.
check_logic.calculation: Verify the formation of Chandradhiyoga (Rule: Chandradhiyoga Formation).

rules.impact_if_violated: The native may lack prosperity and pleasure, face foes, experience a shorter life, and be susceptible to diseases and dangers.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: This rule describes multiple effects of Chandradhiyoga.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Dignity for Yoga-Forming Planets (Vesi, Ubayachari)

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the strength and beneficence of yogas like Vesi, Vesi, and Ubayachari.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the planets forming the yoga. Check if these planets are in their own sign, a friendly sign, or their sign of exaltation.

rules.impact_if_violated: The yoga's benefic results (e.g., vast wealth and comforts) will be significantly diminished or absent, even if the yoga technically forms.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 122
rules.extraction_notes: Rule extracted from the description of Vesi, Vesi, and Ubayachari yogas, specifically regarding the condition for 'king-like' results.

rules.rule_name: Moon must be aspected by Venus for Gajakesari Yoga

check_logic.condition: To confirm the formation of Gajakesari Yoga as described in this text.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if Venus aspects the Moon as per classical aspect rules.

rules.impact_if_violated: Gajakesari Yoga (as described in this specific text) is not formed.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse ११७
rules.extraction_notes: One of the specific planetary aspect conditions for Gajakesari Yoga as described in this text, which explicitly lists Venus, Jupiter, and Mercury.

rules.rule_name: Moon must be aspected by Jupiter for Gajakesari Yoga

check_logic.condition: To confirm the formation of Gajakesari Yoga as described in this text.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if Jupiter aspects the Moon as per classical aspect rules.

rules.impact_if_violated: Gajakesari Yoga (as described in this specific text) is not formed.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse ११७
rules.extraction_notes: One of the specific planetary aspect conditions for Gajakesari Yoga as described in this text, which explicitly lists Venus, Jupiter, and Mercury. This is a core planet for Gajakesari.

rules.rule_name: Moon must be aspected by Mercury for Gajakesari Yoga

check_logic.condition: To confirm the formation of Gajakesari Yoga as described in this text.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if Mercury aspects the Moon as per classical aspect rules.

rules.impact_if_violated: Gajakesari Yoga (as described in this specific text) is not formed.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse ११७
rules.extraction_notes: One of the specific planetary aspect conditions for Gajakesari Yoga as described in this text, which explicitly lists Venus, Jupiter, and Mercury.

rules.rule_name: Moon must not be combust for Gajakesari Yoga

check_logic.condition: To confirm the formation of Gajakesari Yoga as described in this text.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the Moon is within the combustion orb of the Sun (i.e., 'depressed or obscured by the Sun').

rules.impact_if_violated: Gajakesari Yoga (as described in this specific text) is not formed or its effects are severely diminished.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse ११७
rules.extraction_notes: The text explicitly states 'without being depressed or obscured by the Sun', which refers to the state of combustion.

rules.rule_name: Exclusion of Sun and Moon in Subha, Asubha, and Karthari Yogas

check_logic.condition: When calculating Subha Yoga, Asubha Yoga, or Karthari Yoga as described in Jataka Parijata Slokas 125-127.
check_logic.calculation: The Sun and the Moon must not be reckoned (included) in the planetary considerations for the formation of these specific yogas.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect calculation and identification of Subha, Asubha, and Karthari Yogas, leading to fundamentally erroneous predictions regarding the native's character, wealth, and strength.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse 127
rules.extraction_notes: Explicit rule stating the exclusion of Sun and Moon for the calculation of Subha, Asubha, and Karthari Yogas.

rules.rule_name: Vesi Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To determine the presence of Vesi Yoga in a chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (excluding the Moon, Rahu, and Ketu, unless specified otherwise by other classical texts) occupies the 12th bhava from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Vesi Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding its effects and the native's characteristics.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita Sloka 121
rules.extraction_notes: Rule extracted from the definition of Vesi Yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Vasi Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To determine the presence of Vasi Yoga in a chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (excluding the Moon, Rahu, and Ketu, unless specified otherwise by other classical texts) occupies the 2nd bhava from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Vasi Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding its effects and the native's characteristics.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita Sloka 121
rules.extraction_notes: Rule extracted from the definition of Vasi Yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Ubhayachari Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To determine the presence of Ubhayachari Yoga in a chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if planets (excluding the Moon, Rahu, and Ketu, unless specified otherwise by other classical texts) occupy both the 12th and 2nd bhavas from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Ubhayachari Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding its effects and the native's characteristics.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita Sloka 121
rules.extraction_notes: Rule extracted from the definition of Ubhayachari Yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Dignity: Swakshetra (Own Sign)

check_logic.condition: Moon is in its own sign.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Moon is placed in Cancer (its own sign).

rules.impact_if_violated: Moon's inherent strength and auspiciousness are significantly reduced, impacting mental stability, emotional well-being, and general fortune.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the interpretation of the Sanskrit sloka 'स्वांशेऽधिमित्रस्यांशे वा स्थिते वा दिवसे शशी' which refers to Moon in its own sign ('स्वांशे'). This is a fundamental dignity rule.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Dignity: Adhimitra Kshetra (Friendly Sign)

check_logic.condition: Moon is in a friendly sign.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Moon is placed in a sign ruled by a friendly planet (e.g., Sun, Mercury, Jupiter).

rules.impact_if_violated: Moon's inherent strength and auspiciousness are moderately reduced if not in a friendly sign, affecting emotional resilience and general support.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the interpretation of the Sanskrit sloka 'स्वाधिमित्रांशगश्चन्द्रो दृष्टो दानवमन्त्रिणा' and 'स्वांशेऽधिमित्रस्यांशे वा स्थिते वा दिवसे शशी' which refers to Moon in a friendly sign ('अधिमित्रस्यांशे'). This is a fundamental dignity rule.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Paksha Bala: Kendra from Sun (Weak/Bad)

check_logic.condition: Moon is in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th house) from the Sun.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the house position of the Moon relative to the Sun. If it is 1st (conjunction), 4th, 7th (opposition), or 10th, this condition applies.

rules.impact_if_violated: Moon's strength (Paksha Bala) is considered 'bad' or weak, significantly impacting mental state, emotional stability, decision-making, and general well-being. This includes Full Moon (7th from Sun) as per Varahamihira's view mentioned.
rules.extraction_notes: Directly stated: 'The Moon in a Kendra from the Sun is bad whether in the conjunction (1st), in a square (4th or 10th) or in opposition (7th)'. This is a fundamental rule for assessing Moon's strength based on its phase.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Paksha Bala: 2nd, 5th, 8th, 11th from Sun (Middling)

check_logic.condition: Moon is in the 2nd, 5th, 8th, or 11th house from the Sun.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the house position of the Moon relative to the Sun. If it is 2nd, 5th, 8th, or 11th, this condition applies.

rules.impact_if_violated: Moon's strength (Paksha Bala) is considered 'middling', leading to mixed results for mental state, emotions, and general well-being.
rules.extraction_notes: Directly stated: 'The Moon situated in the 2nd, 5th, 8th and 11th from the Sun is middling'. This is a fundamental rule for assessing Moon's strength based on its phase.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Paksha Bala: 3rd, 6th, 9th, 12th from Sun (Good)

check_logic.condition: Moon is in the 3rd, 6th, 9th, or 12th house from the Sun.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the house position of the Moon relative to the Sun. If it is 3rd, 6th, 9th, or 12th, this condition applies.

rules.impact_if_violated: Moon's strength (Paksha Bala) is considered 'good', enhancing mental state, emotions, and general well-being.
rules.extraction_notes: Directly stated: 'The Moon situated in the 3rd, 6th, 9th and 12th from the Sun is good in result'. This is a fundamental rule for assessing Moon's strength based on its phase.

rules.rule_name: Parvatha Yoga Existence Validation

check_logic.condition: To validate the presence of Parvatha Yoga in a birth chart.
check_logic.calculation: 1. Identify the Lord of the Lagna (Ascendant). 2. Identify the Lord of the 12th Bhava. 3. Determine the relative house positions of these two lords. They must be in Kendra positions (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th house from each other). 4. Check if both the Lagna Lord and the 12th Lord are aspected by friendly planets.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Parvatha Yoga, leading to flawed predictions regarding fortune, learning, generosity, sensual desires, fame, and leadership.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse 129
rules.extraction_notes: This rule defines the specific astrological conditions required for the formation of Parvatha Yoga. It involves identifying house lords, their relative positions (Kendra), and aspects from friendly planets.

rules.rule_name: Parvata Yoga Formation - Condition 1

check_logic.condition: To check for the formation of Parvata Yoga (Condition 1) as per Jataka Parijata.
check_logic.calculation:
1. Identify all natural benefic planets (Jupiter, Venus, waxing Moon, and Mercury when not associated with malefics).
2. Verify that these benefic planets are located in Kendra houses (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th).
3. Confirm that the 6th house is either unoccupied or occupied only by benefic planets.
4. Confirm that the 8th house is either unoccupied or occupied only by benefic planets.

rules.impact_if_violated: Parvata Yoga (Condition 1) is not formed, leading to an incorrect assessment of auspiciousness and potential for high status/happiness.
rules.extraction_notes: Definition of Parvata Yoga from Sanskrit text and English translation. 'सौम्येषु केन्द्रगृहगेषु सपत्नरन्धे शुद्धेऽथवा शुभयुते यदि पर्वतः स्यात्'.

rules.rule_name: Parvata Yoga Formation - Condition 2

check_logic.condition: To check for the formation of Parvata Yoga (Condition 2) as per Jataka Parijata.
check_logic.calculation:
1. Identify the lord of the Lagna (1st house).
2. Identify the lord of the 12th house.
3. Verify that the Lagna lord and the 12th lord are in mutual Kendra houses (i.e., each is in the 1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th house from the other).
4. Confirm that both the Lagna lord and the 12th lord are aspected by friendly planets.

rules.impact_if_violated: Parvata Yoga (Condition 2) is not formed, leading to an incorrect assessment of auspiciousness and potential for high status/happiness.
rules.extraction_notes: Alternative definition of Parvata Yoga from Sanskrit text. 'लग्नान्त्यपौ यदि परस्परकेन्द्रयातौ मित्रेक्षितौ भवति पर्वतनामयोगः'.

rules.rule_name: Benefic Planets for Adhiyoga Definition

check_logic.condition: When identifying planets for Adhiyoga formation
check_logic.calculation: Identify Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus as the benefic planets relevant for Adhiyoga.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of benefic planets will lead to misidentification or misinterpretation of Adhiyoga.
rules.extraction_notes: Defines the specific set of benefic planets (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) to be considered for Adhiyoga.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - General Condition

check_logic.condition: To determine if Adhiyoga is present in a chart
check_logic.calculation: Check if any of the benefic planets (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) occupy the 6th, 7th, or 8th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Failure to check these houses from the Moon will result in missing the potential for Adhiyoga.
rules.extraction_notes: This is the overarching condition for Adhiyoga. Specific configurations and grading are detailed in subsequent rules.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - Type 1 (Benefics in 6th, 7th, and 8th from Moon)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific configuration of Adhiyoga (one of the seven sorts)
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one benefic planet (Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus) is in the 6th house from the Moon, AND at least one benefic is in the 7th house from the Moon, AND at least one benefic is in the 8th house from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific and potent Adhiyoga configuration will be missed.
rules.extraction_notes: One of the seven specific Adhiyoga configurations mentioned by Srutakeerti.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - Type 2 (Benefics in 6th and 7th from Moon)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific configuration of Adhiyoga (one of the seven sorts)
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one benefic planet (Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus) is in the 6th house from the Moon, AND at least one benefic is in the 7th house from the Moon (with no benefics necessarily in the 8th).

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Adhiyoga configuration will be missed.
rules.extraction_notes: One of the seven specific Adhiyoga configurations mentioned by Srutakeerti.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - Type 3 (Benefics in 6th and 8th from Moon)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific configuration of Adhiyoga (one of the seven sorts)
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one benefic planet (Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus) is in the 6th house from the Moon, AND at least one benefic is in the 8th house from the Moon (with no benefics necessarily in the 7th).

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Adhiyoga configuration will be missed.
rules.extraction_notes: One of the seven specific Adhiyoga configurations mentioned by Srutakeerti.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - Type 4 (Benefics in 7th and 8th from Moon)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific configuration of Adhiyoga (one of the seven sorts)
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one benefic planet (Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus) is in the 7th house from the Moon, AND at least one benefic is in the 8th house from the Moon (with no benefics necessarily in the 6th).

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Adhiyoga configuration will be missed.
rules.extraction_notes: One of the seven specific Adhiyoga configurations mentioned by Srutakeerti.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - Type 5 (Benefic in 6th from Moon only)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific configuration of Adhiyoga (one of the seven sorts)
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one benefic planet (Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus) is in the 6th house from the Moon, AND no benefic planets are in the 7th or 8th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Adhiyoga configuration will be missed.
rules.extraction_notes: One of the seven specific Adhiyoga configurations mentioned by Srutakeerti. The 'only' condition is crucial for this specific type.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - Type 6 (Benefic in 7th from Moon only)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific configuration of Adhiyoga (one of the seven sorts)
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one benefic planet (Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus) is in the 7th house from the Moon, AND no benefic planets are in the 6th or 8th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Adhiyoga configuration will be missed.
rules.extraction_notes: One of the seven specific Adhiyoga configurations mentioned by Srutakeerti. The 'only' condition is crucial for this specific type.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Formation - Type 7 (Benefic in 8th from Moon only)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific configuration of Adhiyoga (one of the seven sorts)
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one benefic planet (Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus) is in the 8th house from the Moon, AND no benefic planets are in the 6th or 7th houses from the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Adhiyoga configuration will be missed.
rules.extraction_notes: One of the seven specific Adhiyoga configurations mentioned by Srutakeerti. The 'only' condition is crucial for this specific type.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Grading - Three Benefics

check_logic.condition: When grading the strength of Adhiyoga based on the number of benefics involved
check_logic.calculation: Count the number of benefic planets (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) occupying the 6th, 7th, or 8th houses from the Moon. If all three benefics are present, it indicates a strong Adhiyoga.

rules.impact_if_violated: The highest grade of Adhiyoga will be misidentified or its full potential missed.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule grades the Adhiyoga based on the total count of benefics in the relevant houses, distinct from the specific configurations.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Grading - Two Benefics

check_logic.condition: When grading the strength of Adhiyoga based on the number of benefics involved
check_logic.calculation: Count the number of benefic planets (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) occupying the 6th, 7th, or 8th houses from the Moon. If exactly two benefics are present, it indicates a medium strength Adhiyoga.

rules.impact_if_violated: A medium grade of Adhiyoga will be misidentified or its potential missed.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule grades the Adhiyoga based on the total count of benefics in the relevant houses.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Grading - One Benefic

check_logic.condition: When grading the strength of Adhiyoga based on the number of benefics involved
check_logic.calculation: Count the number of benefic planets (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) occupying the 6th, 7th, or 8th houses from the Moon. If exactly one benefic is present, it indicates a weaker Adhiyoga.

rules.impact_if_violated: A weaker grade of Adhiyoga will be misidentified or its potential missed.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule grades the Adhiyoga based on the total count of benefics in the relevant houses.

rules.rule_name: Adhiyoga Outcome - Benefic Strength Correlation

check_logic.condition: After identifying Adhiyoga, to determine the specific manifestation and rank of its effects.
check_logic.calculation: Assess the individual strength (superior, medium, or ordinary) of the benefic planets forming the Adhiyoga. The outcome (e.g., king, minister, commander) is directly correlated with the collective strength of these benefics.

rules.impact_if_violated: The specific manifestation and rank of the Adhiyoga's positive effects will be incorrectly assessed.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule emphasizes that the strength of the participating benefics is crucial for determining the *degree* of the Adhiyoga's positive results.

rules.rule_name: Vesi Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify Vesi Yoga in a horoscope.
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one planet (excluding the Moon) is situated in the 2nd house from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Vesi Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding intelligence, wealth, and character.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Jatanmade Section
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the Sanskrit definition: 'सूर्याद्वचग्गैर्वामिर्वित्तर्गतश्चन्द्रवर्जितर्वसि'. 'वित्तर्गतः' refers to the 2nd house (house of wealth). The text describes effects of 'वेसियोग' and then provides this definition, which aligns with Vesi Yoga.

rules.rule_name: Ubhayachari Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify Ubhayachari Yoga in a horoscope.
check_logic.calculation: Check if at least one planet (excluding the Moon) is situated in the 2nd house from the Sun AND at least one planet (excluding the Moon) is situated in the 12th house from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Ubhayachari Yoga, leading to erroneous predictions regarding princely status, wealth, and character.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Jatanmade Section
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the Sanskrit definition: 'उभयस्थितैर्महेन्द्रैरुभयचरी नामतो योगाः'. 'उभयस्थितैः' refers to planets being situated on both sides (2nd and 12th) of the Sun.

rules.rule_name: Lagna Lord Strength for Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: When assessing the formation of Shankha Yoga (and generally for the strength of the horoscope and other yogas where Lagna Lord strength is a prerequisite).
check_logic.calculation: The Lagna Lord must be assessed for strength. This typically involves evaluating its dignity (exaltation, own sign, Moolatrikona), Shadbala, Avasthas, and placement in auspicious houses/signs. A planet is considered strong if it has sufficient dignity and Shadbala points.

rules.impact_if_violated: If the Lagna Lord is not strong, the Shankha Yoga (and potentially other yogas dependent on Lagna Lord strength) will either not form or its positive effects will be significantly diminished or nullified. The overall strength and auspiciousness of the horoscope will also be compromised.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule is a direct condition for the formation of Shankha Yoga, stating 'when the lord of the Lagna is strong'. It implies a general requirement for assessing Lagna Lord strength in astrological analysis, especially for yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Dignity Check (Exaltation/Own House)

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the inherent strength or ability of any planet to give results or form yogas.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if a planet is in its sign of exaltation (Uchcha) or its own sign (Swakshetra).

rules.impact_if_violated: If a planet is not in its sign of exaltation or its own sign, its inherent strength and capacity to deliver its full potential are reduced, though other factors can compensate for this lack of dignity.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: The phrase 'in their own houses' (स्वर्क्षगतैः) or 'स्वोच्चस्वर्क्षगतैः' (in exaltation or own house) implies the necessity of checking for these states of dignity as fundamental indicators of planetary strength.

rules.rule_name: Chamar Yoga Formation - Lagna Lord in Kendra

check_logic.condition: To determine the formation of Chamar Yoga as per Sloka 136.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the Lagna Lord. Check if the Lagna Lord is placed in any of the Kendra houses (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th house) from the Lagna.

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Chamar Yoga configuration does not form.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 136
rules.extraction_notes: One of three conditions for the formation of Chamar Yoga as described in Sloka 136.

rules.rule_name: Chamar Yoga Formation - Lagna Lord Exalted

check_logic.condition: To determine the formation of Chamar Yoga as per Sloka 136.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the Lagna Lord. Check if the Lagna Lord is placed in its exaltation sign.

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Chamar Yoga configuration does not form.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 136
rules.extraction_notes: One of three conditions for the formation of Chamar Yoga as described in Sloka 136.

rules.rule_name: Chamar Yoga Formation - Lagna Lord Aspected by Jupiter

check_logic.condition: To determine the formation of Chamar Yoga as per Sloka 136.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the Lagna Lord. Check if Jupiter casts a full aspect on the Lagna Lord.

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific Chamar Yoga configuration does not form.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 2 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 136
rules.extraction_notes: One of three conditions for the formation of Chamar Yoga as described in Sloka 136.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Exaltation Check

check_logic.condition: When assessing planetary dignity or yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if a planet is in its exaltation sign.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of planetary dignity and potential for yoga formation.
rules.extraction_notes: Inferred from the condition 'यः कश्चित्त्वोच्चराशिस्थो' (one planet is exalted) for Shankhayoga formation, implying that planetary exaltation is a fundamental state to be checked.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Strength Assessment

check_logic.condition: When assessing the efficacy of a planet, especially a house lord, or yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Calculate planetary strength (e.g., Shadbala, Avasthas, etc., as implied by 'बलयुते').

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of a planet's ability to deliver results, leading to flawed yoga analysis and predictions.
rules.extraction_notes: Inferred from the conditions 'कर्माधिपे बलयुते' (lord of 10th house is strong) and 'भाग्येश्वरे बलयुते' (lord of 9th house is strong) for Bheriyoga formation, implying that a general assessment of planetary strength is a fundamental requirement.

rules.rule_name: Kahala Yoga - 9th and 4th lords in Kendra to each other

check_logic.condition: To check for the first part of the primary condition for Kahala Yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the house positions of the 9th lord and 4th lord. Check if they are in Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) from each other.

rules.impact_if_violated: The first part of the primary condition for Kahala Yoga is not met. This specific path to Kahala Yoga formation is invalid.
rules.extraction_notes: This is the first part of the primary condition for Kahala Yoga. Both this and Lagna lord strength must be met for the primary condition to be fulfilled.

rules.rule_name: Kahala Yoga - Lagna Lord must have strength

check_logic.condition: To check for the second part of the primary condition for Kahala Yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Assess the strength (Bala) of the Lagna lord. This implies sufficient strength, typically evaluated through Shadbala or other strength metrics.

rules.impact_if_violated: The second part of the primary condition for Kahala Yoga is not met. This specific path to Kahala Yoga formation is invalid.
rules.extraction_notes: This is the second part of the primary condition for Kahala Yoga. Both this and 9th/4th lords in Kendra must be met for the primary condition to be fulfilled.

rules.rule_name: Kahala Yoga - 10th Lord conjoined by 4th Lord

check_logic.condition: To check for an alternative condition for Kahala Yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the 10th lord is in the same sign as the 4th lord (conjunction).

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific alternative condition for Kahala Yoga (conjunction) is not met. This specific path to Kahala Yoga formation is invalid.
rules.extraction_notes: This is one of the alternative conditions for Kahala Yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Kahala Yoga - 10th Lord aspected by 4th Lord

check_logic.condition: To check for an alternative condition for Kahala Yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the 4th lord aspects the 10th lord (using Vedic aspects: Jupiter 5/9, Mars 4/8, Saturn 3/10, others 7).

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific alternative condition for Kahala Yoga (aspect) is not met. This specific path to Kahala Yoga formation is invalid.
rules.extraction_notes: This is one of the alternative conditions for Kahala Yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Kahala Yoga - 4th Lord in Own Sign (Swakshetra)

check_logic.condition: To check for an alternative condition for Kahala Yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the sign of the 4th lord. Check if it is its own sign (Swakshetra).

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific alternative condition for Kahala Yoga (Swakshetra) is not met. This specific path to Kahala Yoga formation is invalid.
rules.extraction_notes: This is one of the alternative conditions for Kahala Yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Kahala Yoga - 4th Lord in Exaltation Sign (Uchcha)

check_logic.condition: To check for an alternative condition for Kahala Yoga formation.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the sign of the 4th lord. Check if it is its exaltation sign (Uchcha).

rules.impact_if_violated: This specific alternative condition for Kahala Yoga (Uchcha) is not met. This specific path to Kahala Yoga formation is invalid.
rules.extraction_notes: This is one of the alternative conditions for Kahala Yoga formation.

rules.rule_name: Lakshmi Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To determine if Lakshmi Yoga is present in a birth chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the lord of the 9th house AND Venus are both placed in their respective exaltation signs AND both are simultaneously located in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th house) or a Trikona (1st, 5th, or 9th house).

rules.impact_if_violated: Lakshmi Yoga is not formed, and its auspicious effects (e.g., wealth, status, good fortune) will not manifest from this specific yoga.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule extracted from the description of Lakshmi Yoga, as detailed in Phaladeepika and cited in Jataka Parijata.

rules.rule_name: Vesi Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify the presence of Vesi Yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Check if any planet (excluding Moon) is placed in the 2nd house from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Vesi Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also पराशर' section within Jataka Parijata.

rules.rule_name: Ubhayachari Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify the presence of Ubhayachari Yoga.
check_logic.calculation: Check if planets are placed in both the 2nd and 12th houses from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Ubhayachari Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also पराशर' section within Jataka Parijata.

rules.rule_name: Shubha Vesi Yoga Formation

check_logic.calculation: Check if benefic planets (excluding Moon) are placed in the 2nd house from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Shubha Vesi Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also फलदीपिका' section within Jataka Parijata.

check_logic.calculation: Check if malefic planets (excluding Moon) are placed in the 2nd house from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Papa Vesi Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also फलदीपिका' section within Jataka Parijata.

check_logic.calculation: Check if benefic planets are placed in both the 2nd and 12th houses from the Sun.

rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also फलदीपिका' section within Jataka Parijata.

check_logic.calculation: Check if malefic planets are placed in both the 2nd and 12th houses from the Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Papa Ubhayachari Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also फलदीपिका' section within Jataka Parijata.

rules.rule_name: Shubha Kartari Yoga Formation

check_logic.condition: To identify the presence of Shubha Kartari Yoga for a house or planet.
check_logic.calculation: Check if benefic planets are placed in the 2nd and 12th houses from the house or planet in question.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Shubha Kartari Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the house/planet's strength and results.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also फलदीपिका' section within Jataka Parijata. 'सत्पार्श्वे' means 'on both sides'.

check_logic.condition: To identify the presence of Papa Kartari Yoga for a house or planet.
check_logic.calculation: Check if malefic planets are placed in the 2nd and 12th houses from the house or planet in question.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of Papa Kartari Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the house/planet's strength and results.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also फलदीपिका' section within Jataka Parijata. 'पावैस्तु पापा‌यो' means 'malefics on both sides'.

rules.rule_name: Shubha Yoga from Lagna (2nd house benefics)

check_logic.condition: To identify a specific Shubha Yoga related to Lagna and the 2nd house.
check_logic.calculation: Check if benefic planets are placed in the 2nd house from the Lagna, and these benefics are not aspected by malefic planets.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of this Shubha Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the 'Also फलदीपिका' section within Jataka Parijata.

rules.rule_name: Shubha Yoga from Lagna (Lagna occupied by benefics)

check_logic.condition: To identify a Shubha Yoga based on Lagna occupation.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the Lagna is occupied by benefic planets.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of this Shubha Yoga, leading to flawed analysis of the chart's potential.
rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the section 'शुभाशुभाढ्ये यदि जन्मलग्ने शुभाशुभाख्यौ भवतस्तदानीम्' following the Phaladeepika citation.

rules.rule_name: Ashubha Yoga from Lagna (Lagna occupied by malefics)

check_logic.condition: To identify an Ashubha Yoga based on Lagna occupation.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the Lagna is occupied by malefic planets.

rules.extraction_notes: Yoga definition extracted from the section 'शुभाशुभाढ्ये यदि जन्मलग्ने शुभाशुभाख्यौ भवतस्तदानीम्' following the Phaladeepika citation.
