check_logic.calculation: Identify the 2nd Bhava in the birth chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect foundational analysis for matters related to friends or subordinates.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from house signification mapping.

rules.rule_name: Female Fecundity Assessment for Progeny

check_logic.condition: When assessing progeny potential for a female native.
check_logic.calculation: Sum the longitudes (figures representing positions) of Jupiter, the Moon, and Mars. Determine the Rasi (sign) and Navamsa (D9) of the resulting sum.

rules.impact_if_violated: Misjudgment of a female native's inherent capacity to bear children, leading to an inaccurate assessment of progeny promise.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from Phaladeepika section on Putrabhava, as cited in Jataka Parijata Vol 3.

rules.rule_name: Male Virility Assessment for Progeny

check_logic.condition: When assessing progeny potential for a male native.
check_logic.calculation: Sum the longitudes (figures representing positions) of the Sun, Venus, and Jupiter. Determine the Rasi (sign) and Navamsa (D9) of the resulting sum.

rules.impact_if_violated: Misjudgment of a male native's inherent capacity to father children, leading to an inaccurate assessment of progeny promise.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from Phaladeepika section on Putrabhava, as cited in Jataka Parijata Vol 3.

rules.rule_name: Tithi Strength for Progeny Assessment

check_logic.condition: When assessing progeny potential based on Tithi considerations.
check_logic.calculation: Calculate the Tithi from the result of (5 * Moon's longitude) - (5 * Sun's longitude). Identify the Paksha (bright/dark half of the month) and the auspiciousness of this calculated Tithi.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of progeny potential based on the strength and nature of the Tithi, leading to an incomplete analysis.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from Phaladeepika section on Putrabhava, as cited in Jataka Parijata Vol 3.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord in Inimical Sign for Progeny

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the promise of progeny in a birth chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the lord of the 5th house is placed in a sign inimical to it.

rules.impact_if_violated: Strong indication of absence of progeny.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the description of conditions leading to 'पुत्राभावनिदानमेव कथयेत्' (absence of progeny).

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord in Debilitation Sign for Progeny

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the promise of progeny in a birth chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the lord of the 5th house is placed in its sign of debilitation (Neecha Rashi).

rules.impact_if_violated: Strong indication of absence of progeny.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the description of conditions leading to 'पुत्राभावनिदानमेव कथयेत्' (absence of progeny).

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord Combust for Progeny

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the promise of progeny in a birth chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the lord of the 5th house is combust (eclipsed by the Sun's rays).

rules.impact_if_violated: Strong indication of absence of progeny.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the description of conditions leading to 'पुत्राभावनिदानमेव कथयेत्' (absence of progeny).

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord in Dusthana for Progeny

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the promise of progeny in a birth chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the lord of the 5th house is placed in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house (Dusthanas).

rules.impact_if_violated: Strong indication of absence of progeny.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the description of conditions leading to 'पुत्राभावनिदानमेव कथयेत्' (absence of progeny).

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord in 5th House Afflicted by Dusthana Lords for Progeny

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the promise of progeny in a birth chart.
check_logic.calculation: Check if the lord of the 5th house is placed in the 5th house, AND is afflicted by the lords of the 6th, 8th, or 12th houses (e.g., conjunction, aspect, or other malefic association).

rules.impact_if_violated: Strong indication of absence of progeny.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the description of conditions leading to 'पुत्राभावनिदानमेव कथयेत्' (absence of progeny). The phrase 'दुःस्थानपस्तद्वशात्' implies affliction by lords of bad houses.

rules.rule_name: No issues (children) if birth during Amavasya, Chhidra Tithi, Vishti Karana, or Stthira Karana

check_logic.condition: If the native's birth occurs during Amavasya, a Chhidra Tithi, Vishti Karana, or any of the Stthira Karanas.
check_logic.calculation:
Check the Tithi and Karana at the time of birth. 
Chhidra Tithis are: Chaturthi, Shashti, Ashtami, Navami, Dwadasi, and Chaturdasi. 
Stthira Karanas are: Chatushpattha, Nagava, Kimsthughna, and Sakuna. 
Vishti Karana is also a specific condition.

rules.impact_if_violated: The native will not be blessed with issues (children).
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Combines multiple lunar conditions leading to a single, absolute negative outcome for progeny.

rules.rule_name: Avoid Chhidra Tithis for auspicious functions

check_logic.condition: When selecting a Tithi for any auspicious function.
check_logic.calculation:
Ensure the selected Tithi is not one of the Chhidra Tithis. 
Chhidra Tithis are: Chaturthi, Shashti, Ashtami, Navami, Dwadasi, and Chaturdasi.

rules.impact_if_violated: Auspicious functions performed during Chhidra Tithis will be negatively impacted or fail to yield desired results.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Rule for Muhurta (electional astrology) regarding Tithis.

rules.rule_name: Avoid Vishti Karana for auspicious functions

check_logic.condition: When selecting a Karana for any auspicious function.
check_logic.calculation: Ensure the selected Karana is not Vishti (also known as Bhadra).

rules.impact_if_violated: Auspicious functions performed during Vishti Karana will be negatively impacted or fail to yield desired results.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Rule for Muhurta (electional astrology) regarding Karanas.

rules.rule_name: Avoid Stthira Karanas for auspicious functions

check_logic.condition: When selecting a Karana for any auspicious function.
check_logic.calculation:
Ensure the selected Karana is not one of the Stthira Karanas. 
Stthira Karanas are: Chatushpattha, Nagava, Kimsthughna, and Sakuna.

rules.impact_if_violated: Auspicious functions performed during Stthira Karanas will be negatively impacted or fail to yield desired results.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Rule for Muhurta (electional astrology) regarding Karanas.

rules.rule_name: Progeny Analysis: Assessment of Key Planetary Strengths

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the timing of progeny (acquisition of a son).
check_logic.calculation: Identify the 5th house lord, Jupiter, and the lords of the Rasi and Navamsa occupied by the 5th house lord and Jupiter. Assess the strength of each of these planets to determine the strongest among them.

rules.impact_if_violated: The selection of the Dasa/Apahara for progeny prediction will be incorrect, leading to inaccurate timing.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: This rule mandates the assessment of comparative strength for specific planets (5th lord, Jupiter, and their Rasi/Navamsa dispositors) as a prerequisite for determining the Dasa/Apahara for progeny. The method of strength assessment is not detailed in this text segment.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord's Dignity, Combustion, and D60 Placement for Father's Matters

check_logic.condition: When assessing the well-being or happiness of the father, or matters related to the 5th house lord's influence on father.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the lord of the 5th bhava. Check if this planet is: 1. In debilitation (Neecha). OR 2. Combust (Moodha). OR 3. In an inimical sign (Arirashiga). OR 4. In a malefic Shashtyamsa (D60).

rules.impact_if_violated: If any of the specified conditions are met for the 5th house lord, it indicates potential unhappiness or difficulties for the father.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita Sloku 55
rules.extraction_notes: This rule combines checks on planetary dignity (debilitation, inimical sign), combustion, and divisional chart (D60) placement for the 5th house lord. The conditions are 'OR' conditions, meaning any one of them can lead to the stated impact.

rules.rule_name: Compare Rasi vs. Amsa strength for planetary assessment

check_logic.condition: When assessing the overall strength and influence of a planet for specific predictive purposes, especially concerning its significations (e.g., Sun for father, Moon for mother).
check_logic.calculation: Calculate the strength of the Rasi (sign) occupied by the planet. Calculate the strength of the Amsa (Navamsa sign) occupied by the planet. Compare these two strengths to determine which position (Rasi or Amsa) is stronger for the planet.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of a planet's fundamental strength and its potential to manifest its significations, leading to erroneous predictions regarding the matters it represents.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, 61
rules.extraction_notes: This rule mandates a comparative assessment of a planet's strength in the Rasi chart versus its strength in the Navamsa (Amsa) chart as a necessary step for detailed predictive analysis, exemplified by parental death prediction.

rules.rule_name: Yoga Activation: Saturn, Mars, Rahu Conjunction for Fateful Effect

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the specific yoga mentioned in Sarvarthachintamani Verse 59 (involving Saturn, Mars, and Rahu) for its 'fateful effect' (e.g., related to father, maternal uncle, son, mother).
check_logic.calculation: Identify the bhavas where Saturn, Mars, and Rahu are posited. Verify that all three planets (Saturn, Mars, AND Rahu) are present in one or both of the specified bhavas to activate the yoga's effect.

rules.impact_if_violated: The 'fateful effect' attributed to this specific yoga will not manifest if all three planets (Saturn, Mars, Rahu) are not involved as specified. If only two planets are present, the effect will not be produced.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule extracted from the commentary/interpretation of Sarvarthachintamani Verse 59, specifying the requirement for all three planets (Saturn, Mars, Rahu) to be involved for the yoga's effect.

rules.rule_name: Mother's Death at Next Conception Yoga Conditions

check_logic.condition: When predicting the mother's death at the native's next conception based on Jataka Parijata Sloka 59.
check_logic.calculation: Assess the strength (e.g., Shadbala, Avasthas, etc., as per classical texts) of the lord of the 5th bhava. Assess the strength of the lord of the 1st bhava, the lord of the 4th bhava, and the Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: The prediction of the mother's death at the native's next conception is invalid if the specified strength conditions are not met: the lord of the 5th bhava must be strong, AND the lords of the 1st and 4th bhavas AND the Moon must be weak.
rules.extraction_notes: Rule extracted from Jataka Parijata Sloka 59, detailing specific strength requirements for bhava lords and Moon for a particular yoga related to mother's demise.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter well-placed for children

check_logic.condition: Jupiter is well-placed.
check_logic.calculation: Check Jupiter's dignity (exaltation, own sign, friendly sign), house placement (Kendra, Trikona, 2nd, 11th), and lack of affliction (conjunction/aspect by malefics, combustion, debilitation).

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children or difficulties in conception.
rules.extraction_notes: Well-placed implies good dignity, auspicious house, and lack of affliction.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord from Lagna well-placed for children

check_logic.condition: Lord of the 5th house from Lagna is well-placed.
check_logic.calculation: Check 5th Lord's dignity (exaltation, own sign, friendly sign), house placement (Kendra, Trikona, 2nd, 11th), and lack of affliction.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children or difficulties in conception.
rules.extraction_notes: Well-placed implies good dignity, auspicious house, and lack of affliction.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord from Moon well-placed for children

check_logic.condition: Lord of the 5th house from Moon is well-placed.
check_logic.calculation: Check 5th Lord from Moon's dignity (exaltation, own sign, friendly sign), house placement (Kendra, Trikona, 2nd, 11th), and lack of affliction.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children or difficulties in conception.
rules.extraction_notes: Well-placed implies good dignity, auspicious house, and lack of affliction. This is a confirmation from Chandra Lagna.

rules.rule_name: 5th house aspected by benefic or auspicious lord for children

check_logic.condition: The 5th house has on it the aspect of a natural benefic planet OR of a lord owning an auspicious house (i.e., other than the 6th, 8th, or 12th).
check_logic.calculation: Identify natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, waxing Moon, unafflicted Mercury). Identify lords of auspicious houses (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 7th, 9th, 10th, 11th). Check if any of these aspect the 5th house.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children or difficulties in conception.
rules.extraction_notes: Auspicious houses are explicitly defined as 'other than the 6th, 8th or 12th'.

rules.rule_name: Lagna Lord and 5th Lord conjunction for children

check_logic.condition: Lords of the Lagna and 5th house are posited together in a house.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Lagna Lord and 5th Lord are in the same house (conjunction).

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of this yoga reduces the strength of the promise for children.

rules.rule_name: Lagna Lord and 5th Lord mutual benefic aspect for children

check_logic.condition: Lords of the Lagna and 5th house have mutual benefic aspect.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Lagna Lord and 5th Lord mutually aspect each other, and that these aspects are benefic (e.g., not from natural malefics or afflicted planets).

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of this yoga reduces the strength of the promise for children.
rules.extraction_notes: Benefic aspect implies the aspecting planet is a natural benefic or well-disposed.

rules.rule_name: Lagna Lord and 5th Lord mutual exchange (Parivartana Yoga) for children

check_logic.condition: Lords of the Lagna and 5th house occupy each other's places (Parivartana Yoga).
check_logic.calculation: Check if Lagna Lord is in the 5th house AND 5th Lord is in the Lagna.

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of this yoga reduces the strength of the promise for children.
rules.extraction_notes: This describes a specific type of Parivartana Yoga.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord and Jupiter exalted for children

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord and Jupiter are both exalted.
check_logic.calculation: Check the dignity of the 5th Lord and Jupiter.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of many children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a larger condition for 'many children or no children', focusing on the positive aspect.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord and Jupiter in mutual friendly signs for children

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord and Jupiter are in mutual friendly signs.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the friendly signs for the 5th Lord and Jupiter, then check their placements.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of many children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a larger condition for 'many children or no children', focusing on the positive aspect.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord and Jupiter in own houses for children

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord and Jupiter are in their own houses (Swakshetra or Moolatrikona).
check_logic.calculation: Check the dignity of the 5th Lord and Jupiter.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of many children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a larger condition for 'many children or no children', focusing on the positive aspect.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord conjoined with Venus and Sun (dead children)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is conjoined with both Venus AND Sun.
check_logic.calculation: Check for conjunction of 5th Lord with Venus and Sun.

rules.impact_if_violated: Indication of dead children or loss of children.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule is repeated with slightly different wording later, reinforcing its importance.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord conjoined with Mars (barrenness/loss of children)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is conjoined with Mars.
check_logic.calculation: Check for conjunction of 5th Lord with Mars.

rules.impact_if_violated: Indication of barrenness or loss of children.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule is repeated with slightly different wording later, reinforcing its importance.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord conjoined with Rahu (many children)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is conjoined with Rahu.
check_logic.calculation: Check for conjunction of 5th Lord with Rahu.

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of this yoga reduces the promise of many children.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule appears to contradict another statement in the same text (Rule 18) regarding Rahu causing barrenness/few children. Both are extracted as stated.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord aspected by Rahu (many children)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is aspected by Rahu.
check_logic.calculation: Check for Rahu's aspect on the 5th Lord.

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of this yoga reduces the promise of many children.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule appears to contradict another statement in the same text (Rule 18) regarding Rahu causing barrenness/few children. Both are extracted as stated.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord conjoined with a malefic lord (few children)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is conjoined with a malefic lord (e.g., lord of 6th, 8th, or 12th house).
check_logic.calculation: Identify malefic lords based on Lagna. Check for conjunction of 5th Lord with any of these malefic lords.

rules.impact_if_violated: Indication of few children or difficulties in conception.
rules.extraction_notes: Malefic lords are determined by Lagna.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord conjoined with Sun and Venus (childlessness)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is conjoined with both Sun AND Venus.
check_logic.calculation: Check for conjunction of 5th Lord with Sun and Venus.

rules.impact_if_violated: Strong indication of childlessness.
rules.extraction_notes: This is a re-statement of an earlier rule (Rule 11) with stronger wording ('causes childlessness').

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord conjoined with Mars (loss of children)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is conjoined with Mars.
check_logic.calculation: Check for conjunction of 5th Lord with Mars.

rules.impact_if_violated: Strong indication of loss of children.
rules.extraction_notes: This is a re-statement of an earlier rule (Rule 12) with stronger wording ('causes loss of children').

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord conjoined with Rahu (barrenness/few children)

check_logic.condition: The 5th Lord is conjoined with Rahu, even if with a benefic.
check_logic.calculation: Check for conjunction of 5th Lord with Rahu.

rules.impact_if_violated: Indication of barrenness or few children.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule appears to contradict an earlier statement in the same text (Rule 13) regarding Rahu causing many children. Both are extracted as stated. The phrase 'even if with a benefic' highlights the strength of this affliction.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter and 5th Lord in mutual exaltation for children

check_logic.condition: Jupiter and the 5th Lord are in mutual exaltation.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Jupiter is exalted in the sign of the 5th Lord's exaltation, and vice-versa (or simply both are exalted).

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a set of conditions for having children and a good son.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter and 5th Lord in mutual friendly signs for children

check_logic.condition: Jupiter and the 5th Lord are in mutual friendly signs.
check_logic.calculation: Determine friendly signs for Jupiter and 5th Lord, then check their placements.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a set of conditions for having children and a good son.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter and 5th Lord in own houses for children

check_logic.condition: Jupiter and the 5th Lord are in their own houses (Swakshetra or Moolatrikona).
check_logic.calculation: Check the dignity of Jupiter and the 5th Lord.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a set of conditions for having children and a good son.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter and 5th Lord aspected by benefics for children

check_logic.condition: Jupiter and the 5th Lord are aspected by benefic planets.
check_logic.calculation: Identify natural benefics. Check if Jupiter and the 5th Lord receive aspects from these benefics.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a set of conditions for having children and a good son.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter and 5th Lord in auspicious houses for children

check_logic.condition: Jupiter and the 5th Lord are in auspicious houses (Kendra or Trikona).
check_logic.calculation: Check the house placements of Jupiter and the 5th Lord.

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of children.
rules.extraction_notes: Part of a set of conditions for having children and a good son.

rules.rule_name: Lagna Lord in 5th house for a son

check_logic.condition: The Lord of the 1st bhava occupies the 5th house.
check_logic.calculation: Check the house placement of the Lagna Lord.

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of this placement reduces the promise of a son.
rules.extraction_notes: This is a specific placement for a son.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord possesses strength for a son

check_logic.condition: The Lord of the 5th bhava possesses strength.
check_logic.calculation: Assess the strength of the 5th Lord (e.g., Shadbala, dignity, house placement, lack of affliction).

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of a son or difficulties with children.
rules.extraction_notes: Strength is a general assessment, not a specific numerical threshold from this text.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter in full strength for a son

check_logic.condition: Jupiter is in full strength.
check_logic.calculation: Assess the strength of Jupiter (e.g., Shadbala, dignity, house placement, lack of affliction).

rules.impact_if_violated: Reduced promise of a son or difficulties with children.
rules.extraction_notes: Full strength is a general assessment, not a specific numerical threshold from this text.

rules.rule_name: 5th House Significators Weak/Afflicted for Children

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the promise of children in a chart.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the 5th house lord, Jupiter (Karaka for children), planets aspecting the 5th house, and planets occupying the 5th house. Check if any of these planets: (1) own a Dustthana (6th, 8th, 12th house), OR (2) are generally weak (e.g., debilitated, combust, low Shadbala), OR (3) are posited in a Dustthana (6th, 8th, 12th house).

rules.impact_if_violated: Indicates potential for loss or difficulty in acquiring children.

rules.rule_name: 5th House Significators Strong and Benefic for Children

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the promise of children in a chart.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the 5th house lord, Jupiter (Karaka for children), planets aspecting the 5th house, and planets occupying the 5th house. Check if all of these planets are: (1) strong (e.g., exalted, in own sign, high Shadbala, Vargottama), AND (2) benefic (natural benefics, or functional benefics for the Lagna).

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of strong and benefic significators reduces the promise of easy acquisition and prosperity of children.

rules.rule_name: Dustthana House Identification

check_logic.condition: Whenever house classifications are required.
check_logic.calculation: The 6th, 8th, and 12th houses are classified as Dustthanas (evil houses).

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect classification of houses leads to fundamental errors in astrological analysis.
rules.extraction_notes: The text refers to 'दुःस्थान (Dustthana)' assuming prior knowledge of which houses these are. This rule defines them.

rules.rule_name: Jupiter as Karaka for Children

check_logic.condition: When analyzing matters related to children.
check_logic.calculation: Jupiter is the natural significator (Karaka) for children.

rules.impact_if_violated: Ignoring Jupiter's role leads to incomplete or incorrect analysis of children-related matters.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata 50 (implied by 'its Karaka'), Phaladipika (explicitly lists Jupiter)

rules.rule_name: Navamsa Confirmation for Children Timing (Jupiter Transit)

check_logic.condition: When timing the acquisition of children through Jupiter's transit.
check_logic.calculation: Confirm Jupiter's transit in the Rasi chart with its transit in the Navamsa Rasi of the 5th lord or Yamakantaka.

rules.impact_if_violated: Timing predictions for children based solely on Rasi chart transits may be inaccurate without Navamsa confirmation.

rules.rule_name: House Lordship Identification

check_logic.condition: Whenever the lord of a house is referenced.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the planet that rules the sign occupying a specific house. This planet is the lord of that house.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect identification of house lords leads to fundamental errors in astrological analysis.
rules.classical_reference: Implied by Jataka Parijata 50 and Phaladipika
rules.extraction_notes: The text refers to 'lord of the 5th bhava', 'lord of the Lagna', 'lord of the 7th', assuming prior knowledge of how to determine house lords. This rule defines that process.

rules.rule_name: Yamakantaka Identification

check_logic.condition: When using Yamakantaka for timing children-related events.
check_logic.calculation: Calculate the position of the Upagraha Yamakantaka based on classical methods.

rules.impact_if_violated: Inability to calculate Yamakantaka prevents the use of specific timing techniques mentioned in classical texts.
rules.extraction_notes: The text mentions Yamakantaka without providing its calculation method, implying it's a known astrological point.

rules.rule_name: Assessment of 6th House Afflictors' Malefic Nature and Weakness

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the indications of the 6th house (e.g., health, enemies, debt, service).
check_logic.calculation: 1. Identify the lord of the 6th house from Lagna. 2. Identify all planets occupying the 6th house. 3. Identify all planets aspecting the 6th house. 4. For each identified planet, determine if it is a natural malefic (Sun, Mars, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu, waning Moon, Mercury associated with malefics). 5. For each identified planet, assess its overall strength (e.g., Shadbala, Avasthas, dignity).

rules.impact_if_violated: If the lord of the 6th house, its occupants, and its aspectors are natural malefics and weak, it indicates negative outcomes related to the 6th house, such as destruction of wealth (cattle), disease, and fear from enemies. If they are strong and/or benefics, these negative effects are mitigated or reversed.

cancellation_conditions.condition: If the identified planets are natural benefics or associated with benefics.
cancellation_conditions.impact: Negative effects are reduced or reversed.

cancellation_conditions.condition: If the identified planets are strong (e.g., high Shadbala, exalted, in own sign, or otherwise dignified).
cancellation_conditions.impact: Negative effects are reduced or reversed.

rules.extraction_notes: Rule derived from the conditional statement regarding the nature and strength of planets related to the 6th house and their resulting effects. The 'weak' condition implies a strength assessment.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord Placement for Intellect (Negative)

check_logic.condition: When assessing the native's intellect.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the 5th house lord. Check if its placement is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house from the Lagna.

rules.impact_if_violated: Indicates a predisposition to dull intellect.
rules.extraction_notes: Derived from 'दुःस्थे बुद्धिस्थानपेऽदृश्यगे वा जातो मन्दप्रायबुद्धिं समेति'. 'दुःस्थे' and 'अदृश्यगे' both refer to malefic houses (6, 8, 12).

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord Placement for Intellect (Positive)

check_logic.condition: When assessing the native's intellect.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the 5th house lord. Check if its placement is in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) or Kona (1st, 5th, 9th) house from the Lagna.

rules.impact_if_violated: Absence of this placement reduces the potential for high intelligence, but does not guarantee dullness.
rules.extraction_notes: Derived from 'केन्द्रे कोणे... बुद्धिमानिङ्गितज्ञः'. This is one of the conditions for intelligence.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord Association with Benefics/Jupiter for Intellect

check_logic.condition: When assessing the native's intellect.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the 5th house lord. Check if it is conjoined with or aspected by natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, waxing Moon, unafflicted Mercury) and specifically Jupiter.

rules.impact_if_violated: Lack of benefic association reduces the potential for sharp and discerning intellect.
rules.extraction_notes: Derived from 'सौम्यवागीशयुक्ते... बुद्धिमानिङ्गितज्ञः'. This is one of the conditions for intelligence.

rules.rule_name: 5th Lord Strength for Intellect

check_logic.condition: When assessing the native's intellect.
check_logic.calculation: Assess the overall strength (e.g., Shadbala, Avasthas, dignity) of the 5th house lord. The planet must be 'Veeryopete' (endowed with strength).

rules.impact_if_violated: A weak 5th lord diminishes the positive results related to intellect, even if other conditions are favorable.
rules.extraction_notes: Derived from 'वीर्योपेते... बुद्धिमानिङ्गितज्ञः'. This is one of the conditions for intelligence.

rules.rule_name: Sun's Vedha positions from Moon's house

check_logic.condition: When assessing the effects of Sun's transit from Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi).
check_logic.calculation: To determine the Vedha house for the Sun, first identify the Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi). If the Sun is transiting in house 'X' (1-12) from the Moon's natal house, the Vedha house is the 'X-th' element from the following list, reckoned from the Moon's natal house: [1, 2, 9, 3, 6, 12, 7, 8, 10, 4, 5, 11]. For example, if Sun transits in the 3rd house from Moon, the Vedha house is the 9th house from Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Sun's transit effects, leading to inaccurate predictions regarding auspiciousness or inauspiciousness of the transit.

cancellation_conditions.condition: If the Vedha sign for Sun (as determined by the table) is occupied by Saturn.
cancellation_conditions.impact: Sun's Vedha effect is nullified, meaning the transit's good effects will not be obstructed.

rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from the 'Vedah वेध signs reckoned from the house of the Moon' table for Sun. The list [1, 2, 9, 3, 6, 12, 7, 8, 10, 4, 5, 11] represents the Vedha house (from Moon) for each house (1-12) from Moon respectively.

rules.rule_name: Moon's Vedha positions from Moon's house

check_logic.condition: When assessing the effects of Moon's transit from Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi).
check_logic.calculation: To determine the Vedha house for the Moon, first identify the Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi). If the Moon is transiting in house 'X' (1-12) from the Moon's natal house, the Vedha house is the 'X-th' element from the following list, reckoned from the Moon's natal house: [5, 1, 9, 3, 6, 12, 2, 7, 10, 4, 8, 11]. For example, if Moon transits in the 1st house from Moon, the Vedha house is the 5th house from Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Moon's transit effects, leading to inaccurate predictions regarding auspiciousness or inauspiciousness of the transit.

cancellation_conditions.condition: If the Vedha sign for Moon (as determined by the table) is occupied by Mercury.
cancellation_conditions.impact: Moon's Vedha effect is nullified, meaning the transit's good effects will not be obstructed.

For example, if Mars transits in the 3rd house from Moon, the Vedha house is the 12th house from Moon.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of Mars' transit effects, leading to inaccurate predictions regarding auspiciousness or inauspiciousness of the transit.

rules.rule_name: Mercury's Vedha positions from Moon's house

check_logic.condition: When assessing the effects of Mercury's transit from Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi).
check_logic.calculation: To determine the Vedha house for Mercury, first identify the Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi). check_logic.calculation: To determine the Vedha house for Jupiter, first identify the Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi). check_logic.calculation: To determine the Vedha house for Venus, first identify the Moon's natal house (Janma Rasi). rules.rule_name: Planetary Strength Assessment: Mridu State Criteria

check_logic.condition: When assessing a planet's inherent beneficence and strength, specifically its 'Mridu' state as per this text.
check_logic.calculation: A planet is considered to be in a 'Mridu' state (benefic/strong) if ALL of the following conditions are met: (1) it has attained Gopura or higher Vais'eshikamsas, AND (2) it occupies a benefic Navamsa, AND (3) it is aspected by a benefic planet.

rules.impact_if_violated: The planet's inherent beneficence and strength (Mridu state) will be incorrectly assessed, leading to a flawed foundational analysis of its capacity to deliver results.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule defines specific criteria for a planet to be considered 'Mridu' (soft/benefic/strong). The numbering 'or (2)' and '(3)' is interpreted as a continuation of conditions defining the 'Mridu' state, where all listed conditions must be met. The 'or' is considered a stylistic element or a numbering artifact rather than a logical OR operator for the entire set of conditions.

rules.rule_name: Vedha Nullification of Transit Effects

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the effects of planetary transits (Gocharaphala) from the Moon sign (Janma Rasi).
check_logic.calculation: 1. Identify the house being transited by a planet from the Moon sign. 2. Determine the corresponding Vedha (obstruction) house for that specific transit. 3. Check if the Vedha house is occupied by any planet at the time of consideration.

rules.impact_if_violated: The predicted good or evil results of the transit will be nullified or even reversed. An incorrect prediction will be made.
rules.extraction_notes: This rule states that transit results are conditional on the Vedha position being unoccupied. The text mentions specific Vedha positions are from Kalaprakashika, and lists numbers '3 6 12 2 7 10 1 8 11' for the Sun, but does not clearly map these numbers to specific transit-Vedha pairs in a tabular format within the provided text. Therefore, only the general validation rule for Vedha is extracted, not the specific Vedha house mappings.

rules.rule_name: Assessment of Planetary Strength for Predictive Analysis

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the potential for positive or negative outcomes from planets.
check_logic.calculation: Determine the strength of planets using classical methods (e.g., Shadbala, Sthana Bala, Kala Bala, etc.) to ascertain if they are 'strong' or 'very strong'.

rules.impact_if_violated: Inaccurate assessment of a planet's capacity to deliver its results, leading to incorrect predictions regarding the manifestation of benefic outcomes or mitigation of troubles.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse 76
rules.extraction_notes: Inferred from the repeated emphasis on 'strong' and 'great strength' as a prerequisite for specific positive outcomes (e.g., wealth, disappearance of disease, mitigation of enemies). The text implies that assessing planetary strength is a fundamental step for predictive analysis.

rules.rule_name: Assessment of Planetary Beneficence for Predictive Analysis

check_logic.condition: When evaluating the nature (positive or negative) of outcomes from planets.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if a planet is 'benefic' or 'exceedingly benefic' based on its natural nature, temporary nature (lordship, association), and placement.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect determination of a planet's capacity to deliver positive or negative results, leading to erroneous predictions about the nature of events.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse 76
rules.extraction_notes: Inferred from the repeated emphasis on 'benefic' and 'exceedingly benefic' planets as a prerequisite for specific positive outcomes (e.g., wealth, disappearance of disease, mitigation of enemies). The text implies that assessing planetary beneficence is a fundamental step for predictive analysis.

rules.rule_name: Assessment of Planetary House Placement

check_logic.condition: For any astrological analysis involving planetary effects.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the house(s) occupied by each planet in the birth chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: Inability to correctly interpret the areas of life influenced by a planet, leading to fundamental errors in any astrological prediction.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita, Verse 76
rules.extraction_notes: Inferred from the explicit mention of specific house placements (Kendra, Trikona, 11th bhava) as a condition for certain outcomes. This implies that identifying the house placement of all planets is a fundamental and non-negotiable step in astrological analysis.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Dignity - Inimical Sign

check_logic.condition: When assessing the strength and nature of any planet.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if a planet is placed in a sign ruled by a planet inimical to it. This requires knowledge of planetary friendships and enmities.

rules.impact_if_violated: The planet's ability to give auspicious results is diminished, and it may cause difficulties related to its significations and house lordships. It indicates a challenging environment for the planet.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from 'inimical ... sign' part of the text. This is a fundamental check for planetary strength.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Dignity - Debilitation Sign

check_logic.condition: When assessing the fundamental strength and dignity of any planet.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if a planet is placed in its sign of debilitation (Neecha Rashi).

rules.impact_if_violated: The planet is extremely weak and unable to give good results; it may cause significant challenges and failures related to its significations and house lordships. Can indicate severe affliction and lack of power.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from 'its depression sign' part of the text. This is a table-based rule in practice, as debilitation signs are fixed for each planet.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Retrogression (Vakra Gati)

check_logic.condition: When assessing the nature and timing of any planet's effects.
check_logic.calculation: Determine if a planet is in retrograde motion (Vakra Gati).

rules.impact_if_violated: The planet's effects become unconventional, delayed, or repeated. It can indicate a re-evaluation or reversal of matters related to its significations. The strength and nature of results are significantly altered.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from 'vakraṃ gato' part of the text.

rules.rule_name: Planetary Combustion (Astangata)

check_logic.condition: When assessing the vitality and functional capacity of any planet (excluding Sun and Moon).
check_logic.calculation: Determine if a planet is combust (eclipsed) by the Sun, i.e., within a specific angular distance from the Sun. The exact degrees vary by planet.

rules.impact_if_violated: The planet loses its independent power and ability to manifest its significations effectively. It becomes subservient to the Sun, often leading to suppression, destruction, or extreme weakness of its indications.
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from 'astago' (eclipsed) part of the text.

rules.rule_name: Planetary House Placement

check_logic.condition: When analyzing the influence of a planet on specific areas of life.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the house (bhava) in which a planet is placed in the birth chart.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect assessment of a planet's influence on specific life areas, leading to fundamental errors in chart interpretation.
rules.extraction_notes: Implied by 'occupy the 6th bhava'. This is a fundamental and non-negotiable check for any astrological analysis.

rules.rule_name: Natural Significator (Karaka) Identification

check_logic.condition: When interpreting the significations of a planet or a house, especially concerning people, relationships, or specific life aspects.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the natural significator (Karaka) associated with a planet or a specific house's indications (e.g., Sun for father, Moon for mother, Mars for siblings, Jupiter for children/guru, Venus for spouse/luxury, Mercury for intellect/communication, Saturn for servants/suffering).

rules.impact_if_violated: Misinterpretation of the nature and source of events, relationships, or qualities indicated by a planet or house, leading to inaccurate predictions.
rules.extraction_notes: Implied by 'the class of people represented by the bhava of which the planet occupying the 6th bhava is the Karaka'. This is a fundamental concept in Vedic astrology for understanding planetary roles.

rules.rule_name: 7th House Adultery Potential Check

check_logic.condition: To assess the potential for adultery in a native's life, specific planetary placements in the 7th house or involving its lord must be checked.
check_logic.calculation: Check if Venus is placed in the 7th house. OR Check if the lord of the 7th house is in conjunction with Rahu. OR Check if the lord of the 7th house is in conjunction with Ketu.

rules.impact_if_violated: Incorrect prediction regarding marital fidelity or potential for adultery.

cancellation_conditions.condition: If the 7th bhava (house) is a benefic sign AND is either occupied by Jupiter OR aspected by Jupiter.
cancellation_conditions.impact: The potential for adultery indicated by the primary conditions is negated.

rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita 14.1
rules.extraction_notes: This rule describes specific planetary placements and house conditions that must be checked to predict or negate the potential for adultery. The cancellation condition is crucial for accurate analysis.

rules.rule_name: Vedah for Sun based on Moon's house

check_logic.condition: When assessing Vedah for Sun relative to the Moon's position.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the house occupied by the Moon (1-12). The Vedah house for Sun is determined as follows: if Moon is in House 1, Vedah house is 1st from Moon; if Moon is in House 2, Vedah house is 2nd from Moon; if Moon is in House 3, Vedah house is 9th from Moon; if Moon is in House 4, Vedah house is 3rd from Moon; if Moon is in House 5, Vedah house is 6th from Moon; if Moon is in House 6, Vedah house is 12th from Moon; if Moon is in House 7, Vedah house is 7th from Moon; if Moon is in House 8, Vedah house is 8th from Moon; if Moon is in House 9, Vedah house is 10th from Moon; if Moon is in House 10, Vedah house is 4th from Moon; if Moon is in House 11, Vedah house is 5th from Moon; if Moon is in House 12, Vedah house is 11th from Moon. If Sun occupies the determined Vedah house, then Sun is in Vedah.

rules.impact_if_violated: The Sun's influence may be obstructed or modified by the Vedah effect from the Moon's house, potentially causing challenges related to its significations and house lordship.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from Vedah table, row for Sun.

rules.rule_name: Vedah for Moon based on Moon's house

check_logic.condition: When assessing Vedah for Moon relative to its own position.
check_logic.calculation: Identify the house occupied by the Moon (1-12). The Vedah house for Moon is determined as follows: if Moon is in House 1, Vedah house is 5th from Moon; if Moon is in House 2, Vedah house is 1st from Moon; if Moon is in House 3, Vedah house is 9th from Moon; if Moon is in House 4, Vedah house is 3rd from Moon; if Moon is in House 5, Vedah house is 6th from Moon; if Moon is in House 6, Vedah house is 12th from Moon; if Moon is in House 7, Vedah house is 2nd from Moon; if Moon is in House 8, Vedah house is 7th from Moon; if Moon is in House 9, Vedah house is 10th from Moon; if Moon is in House 10, Vedah house is 4th from Moon; if Moon is in House 11, Vedah house is 8th from Moon; if Moon is in House 12, Vedah house is 11th from Moon. If Moon occupies the determined Vedah house, then Moon is in Vedah. Note: For most Moon positions, this condition is logically impossible (e.g., Moon cannot be in the 5th house from itself). The only possible condition is when Moon is in House 2, and the Vedah house is 1st from Moon (i.e., Moon is in House 2).

rules.impact_if_violated: The Moon's influence may be obstructed or modified by the Vedah effect, potentially causing challenges related to its significations and house lordship.
rules.classical_reference: Jataka Parijata Vol 3 By Vaidyanatha Dikshita
rules.extraction_notes: Extracted from Vedah table, row for Moon. Note on logical impossibility for most conditions.
